case_title: CACH LLC VS. STEVEN LEUNG et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEVEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-09-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC SERVED FEB-23-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEVEN
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEVEN
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY COLCLOUGH, III, ROBERT J.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEVEN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT ; INTEREST CALCULATION; PURSUANT TO CCP 1033, 116.420 & 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEVEN $1,793.54 PRINCIPAL, $526.75 INTEREST, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,566.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 15355077): VOS, RYAN E. SUBSTITUTED FOR COLCLOUGH, III, ROBERT J. AS ATTORNEY FOR CACH LLC
